summary: test_force_transition_is_a_free_ungated_move (tests/core/test_workflow.py:340) forces WORKING->PLAN, an edge absent from the declared graph (Working.transitions=(Complete,) resolves to {COMPLETE,DROPPED}, no PLAN); apply_transition would raise IllegalTransition for this same move, so the assertion task.state=='PLAN' genuinely proves the declared-graph bypass, not a tautology.
